case_title: FOCUS-GROW ENTREPRENEURS, INC. VS. EMPIRE ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION, INC.

docket_entries.description: SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-09-2015 - JUDGMENT.
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, AS TO DEFENDANT EMPIRE ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION, INC.

MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,459.76 FILED BY FOCUS-GROW ENTREPRENEURS, INC. AS TO DEFENDANT EMPIRE ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-09-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF FOCUS-GROW ENTREPRENEURS, INC.
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT EMPIRE ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION, INC.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF FOCUS-GROW ENTREPRENEURS, INC. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT EMPIRE ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION, INC. $2,200.00 PRINCIPAL, $110.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,310.00, PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM WAS EQUITABLY REDUCED DUE TO NOT HAVING A SIGNED CONTRACT, BILLING FOR WORK ON 2014 ACCOUNTING ISSUES WHEN NOT ASKED TO, & FOR POTENTIAL DISPARAGEMENT ISSUE. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - FEE FOR SERVICE $ 60.00 - SERVED OCT-13-2015, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT EMPIRE ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION, INC.
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM JUDGE MICHAEL MAU. FILED BY FOCUS-GROW ENTREPRENEURS, INC. EMPIRE ENGINEERING & CONSTRUCTION, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-09-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-09-2015 BY JUDGE PRO TEM MICHAEL MAU. PLAINTIFF WAS PRESENT. DEFENDANT WAS PRESENT. PLAINTIFF WAS REPRESENTED BY TERRY CHONG--CRUPI--PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY CLIFTON J. BURCH--PRESIDENT. DEFENDANT WAIVES UNTIMELY SERVICE IN OPEN COURT. PLAINTIFFS EXHIBITS RETAINED. DEFENDANTS EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHAEL MAU. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
